items.rival_reading: Abstract faculties are treated as embodied perceivers or speakers.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Military and political actions are represented through bodily death-work and national embodiment.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Paine applies coercive bodily restraint vocabulary to constitutional and imperial dependence.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Paine uses physical mortality to explain the social necessity of cooperation.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The war is literal, but the phrase condenses political destruction into conventional elemental and bodily imagery.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Legal-political entities do not literally suffer bodily injury or exposure.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Political colonies, pamphlets, and founding moments are not literal parents, infants, worlds, or births.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Some war deaths are literal, but Paine's rhetoric gives them sacrificial political meaning.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The pledge is a real political act, but the closing formula gives it sacred and sacrificial force.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Royal authority is political, but Paine frames it through religious transgression and bodily mortality.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Social formation and moral purity are abstract but are explained through physical force and fortification.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Political collectives and constitutions are abstract institutions, not literal bodies or machines.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Political development is abstract but is construed as organic growth.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Political oppression and institutional remedies are abstract but are framed through physical subjection and protection.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The relation among peoples and states is political, not a literal band or substance.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Battle-victory is extended to denote the triumph of races, ideologies, or laws of nature; the competitive combat source domain is applied to politics and biology.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Biological blood is extended to denote racial descent and inherited essence; the physical source domain underwrites racial-purity claims.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Fate does not literally strike with a hammer, make decisions, or lead people; it is cast as an intentional agent.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: German `Schicksal` here may be a conventional expression for life-lot rather than a live personification.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Individual mind is extended to collective cultural/civilizational agency; abstract spirit becomes a force that builds or degrades civilizations.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Individual soul is extended to collective psychological disposition; the collective soul becomes something that political actors can capture or poison.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Physical soil is extended to denote an organic territorial right; space becomes a biological necessity for the Volk.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The botanical act of rooting out is extended to human elimination; the physical source domain is preserved in the compound.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The exploited population is cast as a sacrificial victim consumed by a predatory agent.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Individual honor is extended to national-collective honor as a possessable, transferable property; the Reich's honor can be restored like a physical object.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Individual soldiers or citizens are idealized through the hero category; heroism becomes the organizing concept for military self-sacrifice.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Physical destruction is extended to social/economic/racial elimination; the basic physical sense underwrites the metaphorical application to groups.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The individual gives up their ego/advantage to the community; this is not a religious ritual but is structured as one.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: A nation is not a biological organism, but it is construed as capable of living.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: A polity is not a biological organism, but its political existence is construed as bodily life or death.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: A social phenomenon is treated as a creature with an origin.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Abstract ambition is repeatedly construed through embodied motion, animal rank, appetite, and fire.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Abstract civic faculties and memorial expectation are treated through bodily and material processes.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Abstract danger or political actors are represented as emerging upward like growth.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Abstract destiny and ambition are represented as attached to an undertaking.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Abstract freedom is construed as a physical structure with a foundation and biblical fortification imagery.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Abstract passions and memories are treated as bodies, agents, or lights.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Ambition and fame are not literal game or crops, but are framed through hunting and agriculture.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: An overseas army is personified as a giant capable of bodily attack.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Government is abstract-institutional but construed as an entity that can be bane or be annihilated.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Historical memory is embodied in persons and wounds as if it were a living readable document.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Human generations and memory are explicitly construed as trees weathered by storms.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Institutional maintenance is framed through structural support and material decay.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Passions and judgment are abstract faculties but are treated as agents with temperaments.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Political destruction is framed through authorship and completion.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Political institutions are explicitly construed as a built edifice.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Political liberty and rational support are explicitly construed as architectural materials.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Political work is construed as construction or demolition of a building.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Political-legal harm is represented through bodily orientation, falling, and ravaging.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Public affairs and attention are construed through combat and physical absorption.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The contextual meaning concerns burial/death rather than ordinary bodily rest after exertion.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The expression frames exploitation through bodily extraction and biblical labor idiom.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The nation is not literally born, yet its founding is framed through birth-generation language.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The nation is treated as an injured body capable of wounds and care.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The sentence explicitly compares corpses on trees with moss or drapery.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The world is treated as a remembering person.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: War is not literally a whip, but it is explicitly called a scourge.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Legal-political reverence is explicitly understood through religious ritual vocabulary.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The constitutional Union is abstract-political but construed as a separable material entity.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: A political order is not a laboratory object, but its success is framed as a trial or proof.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Collective historical existence is explicitly framed as appearing on a stage.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Events under the sun are not literally a ledger, but the sentence frames history through accounting.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Memory is not a fortification, and time does not literally fire artillery.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Reputation and memory are treated through bodily life/death or physical descent.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Biblical usage may be conventional theological idiom rather than a separable metaphor.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The living are not physically set apart like an object or place; they are morally committed to a public task.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Wealth is not literally submerged; it is imagined as disappearing downward or being consumed.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Human death or removal is framed through theatrical stage imagery.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Revolutionary inheritance and legal liberty are treated as bodily/material things that can be spilled, trampled, or torn.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The killing is historical violence, not a ritual offering, but is named through sacrificial vocabulary.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Glory is not a physical covering or companion, but the French phrasing treats it as something one is covered with or dies with.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The objects may be literal, but they also condense monarchy, victory, and imperial memory.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Cannons are not literal mouths; the French military term preserves body/fire imagery.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Fortune does not literally smile or act like a human force.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The army's honor is abstract while blood is bodily; the pair turns battle into bodily and reputational expenditure.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Victory is abstract but is described as hesitating, deciding, or belonging to an army.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: The deaths are literal, but the office and thanksgiving frame them as meaningful patriotic-sacred sacrifice.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: A battle does not literally possess destiny, but the outcome is construed as fate-like.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.

items.rival_reading: Some death is literal, but the phrasing treats death as an output, seed, or glory-bearing sacrificial cost.
items.claim_boundary: Rival readings are per-mapping annotations; cross-case patterns require analyst review.
